missions.name: CyniToast Business Narrative
missions.description: User navigates to /narrative/new/business, fills out the CyniToast narrative wizard, refines the solution with AI, and registers a new account to save it.
missions.mission: User navigates to /narrative/new/business, fills out the CyniToast narrative wizard, refines the solution with AI, and registers a new account to save it.
missions.expectedOutcome: User reaches the final step, refines text with AI successfully, and the Auth Choice Dialog appears upon submission.

missions.name: Check Landing Page
missions.description: Navigate to the home page and verify the header is visible
missions.mission: Navigate to the home page and verify the header is visible
missions.expectedOutcome: The landing page is displayed with the main headline

missions.name: Landing Page Test
missions.description: Verify that 'Marketing Agent' text is present in the hero section
missions.mission: Verify that 'Marketing Agent' text is present in the hero section
missions.expectedOutcome: The text 'Marketing Agent' should be clearly visible

steps.intent: Waiting for the build error to be resolved.
steps.error: Gravity intervention: Action doesn't align with Prime Objective

visionDecision.reasoning: The page is displaying a build error, which prevents me from interacting with the application as intended. I need to wait for the error to be resolved before proceeding with the mission.
visionDecision.visualContext: A build error message is displayed on the screen.
visionDecision.intent: Waiting for the build error to be resolved.
